title: tephrosia newtoniana
intro: Tephrosia newtoniana, also known as Newton's cordia or Newton's pea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Tephrosia newtoniana have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Tephrosia newtoniana is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for its herbal remedies, though its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
